title: ProofMeta License Request
description: Submitted by a Consumer Agent to a Provider Agent's request_endpoint

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this request, generated by the Provider Agent

id.description: Unique identifier for the Consumer Agent

callback_url.description: Optional URL the Provider Agent calls when status changes

item_id.description: Identifier of the item being licensed, as defined by the Provider

license_type.description: ID of the license type from the Provider's manifest

payment.description: Chosen payment resolver e.g. stripe, lightning

delivery.description: Chosen delivery method e.g. https, ipfs

status.description: Current status of the license request

actor.description: ID of the agent or resolver that triggered this status change

note.description: Optional human-readable reason for the status change

resolver_data.description: Optional structured data from the resolver e.g. payment confirmation, delivery URL
